positive: A stylized, abstract floral wreath surrounding a sleeping fox. The fox is rendered in deep sapphire blue and warm amber tones, featuring soft, stylized lines and clean silhouettes. The wreath consists of stylized celestial elements: crescent moons, stars, and geometric leaves drawn in contrasting metallic gold and cool turquoise. The composition is perfectly centered and circular, ideal for a high-contrast apparel print. Flat vector style, minimal detail, strong linework, high contrast, balanced symmetry, cosmic vaporwave aesthetic, clean lines, isolated on a solid background.
negative: ugly, blurry, artifacts, noise, low quality, text, watermark, logos, signatures, extra limbs, bad anatomy, cartoonish, photorealism, messy, cluttered
